title: Mouse pointer disappears in edit mode when the background is White
author: ravirxz
body_snippet:
<!-- Bug -->
|||
|--:|---|
|Operating system | Windows 10 x64 | Windows 2008 / 2012 R2 
|mRemoteNG version| 1.75 aplha 3  |

When opening a file to edit in notepad++ the mouse pointer disappears and makes it difficult to select a line or a field. The only way to select would be to do a select +all and due to the selection being grey the mouse appears. after select the required the mouse disappears again. 


<!-- Feature Request -->
<!-- If you file a feature request, please delete ...

iterations.description: Issue is from 2017 with no recent reproduction on current builds (v1.80+), and our triage comments already asked for retest confirmation with no response — cannot act without confirmed repro steps on modern .NET 10 WinForms

comments.author: kmscode
comments.snippet: Is this possibly a HiDPI issue? See #620 & #321

comments.author: ravirxz

powershell ise or Notepad the Cursor disappears.

having the same issue, any white (editable) box and the cursor disappears. Make trying to manage servers intresting.
Note this was "working before the latest update"

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

A fix for this issue has been implemented in our community fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). A beta build including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and report if this resolves your issue.

notes:
AI triage: Issue is from 2017 with no recent reproduction on current builds (v1.80+), and our triage comments already asked for retest confirmation with no response — cannot act without confirmed repro steps on modern .NET 10 WinForms
Approach: Wait for reporter to confirm issue still exists on latest build; if no response within 30 days, close as stale/not reproducible
